subject: N's Vanillish, an ice cream cone-shaped ice creature floating in a snowy forest scene
description: A small ice cream cone-shaped creature floats in a wintry forest environment. The creature has a rounded ice-cream scoop body topped with a pointed swirl, small eyes, and stick-like arms outstretched to its sides. Around it, pale blue ice crystals or snowflakes drift in the air. The background shows a soft snowy or icy forest with cool blue-white tones and indistinct tree forms. In the lower corner, a small humanoid figure (partially visible, rendered in a chibi or small-portrait style) appears to be associated with the trainer identity 'N'. The overall palette is pale blue, white, and icy teal.
foreground: ice cream cone-shaped creature with outstretched arms, ice crystals floating around it
background: wintry forest with snow and ice
